summary: Iteration 87 testing complete. Verified all requested features: 1) Backend health check working, 2) How It Works page has no 'printed directly' references and mentions export/PDF, 3) Pricing cards display correctly on desktop (4 columns) and mobile (1 column) without text truncation, 4) Landing page footer has separate EXPLORE and LEGAL columns with proper links, 5) ReportView.jsx sanitiseReportOutput strips 'you/your' language, 6) BarristerView.jsx sanitiseReportOutput strips 'you/your' language, 7) Backend _strip_report_placeholders strips 'you/your' and placeholder text, 8) PDF export includes Grounds and Sentence in header, 9) DOCX export includes Grounds and Sentence in header, 10) All 9 public pages load without errors.

how_it_works_no_printed_directly.details: How It Works page does not contain 'printed directly' text

how_it_works_export_references.details: How It Works page mentions export/PDF functionality

pricing_cards_desktop.details: 4 pricing cards display in 4-column grid on desktop (lg:grid-cols-4)

pricing_cards_mobile.details: Pricing cards stack in 1 column on mobile, Barrister View card text not truncated

barrister_view_card_text.details: 'Export to PDF' and 'Unlocks after all 3' text visible in Barrister View card on mobile

footer_explore_column.details: Footer has EXPLORE column with links: How It Works, Resources & Contacts, Forms & Templates, Lawyer Directory, Contact, Success Stories

footer_legal_column.details: Footer has LEGAL column with links: Appeal Statistics, Legal Framework, Legal Glossary, FAQ, About, Terms & Privacy

reportview_sanitise_you_your.details: ReportView.jsx sanitiseReportOutput has patterns for: your opportunity, your conviction, your sentence, your appeal, your case, your trial

barristerview_sanitise_you_your.details: BarristerView.jsx sanitiseReportOutput has patterns for: your opportunity, your conviction, your sentence, your appeal, your case

backend_strip_placeholders.details: Backend strips placeholder text like 'table will reference', 'will be provided'

pdf_export_grounds_sentence.details: PDF export (line 5267-5268) includes Sentence and Grounds count in case info header

docx_export_grounds_sentence.details: DOCX export (line 5506-5508) includes Sentence and Grounds count in case info header

all_pages_load.details: 9/9 public pages load successfully: Landing, How It Works, Appeal Statistics, Resources & Contacts, Legal Framework, Legal Glossary, FAQ, About, Terms & Privacy

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 87 features verified. Key changes: 1) PDF/DOCX exports now include Grounds count and Sentence in header (lines 5267-5268 for PDF, 5506-5508 for DOCX). 2) 'you/your' language stripping implemented in backend _strip_report_placeholders (line 3420+) and frontend sanitiseReportOutput in ReportView.jsx (line 83+) and BarristerView.jsx (line 518+). 3) Placeholder text stripping for 'table will reference', 'will be provided' etc. 4) How It Works page updated to remove 'printed directly' references. 5) Footer reorganised into EXPLORE and LEGAL columns. App uses Emergent Google Auth - authenticated endpoints require actual login.
